creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to version 0.44, which provides the following changes:

- The pee utility now propagates the exit status of commands run
- Miscellaneous tweaks to manpages

While I'm here, delete stuff in FILESDIR related to the 'parallel' utility, 
which has been split off as a separate port.

Fix: =========================
Files Added: 
None
Files Deleted:
files/parallel.1
files/patch-parallel.c
=========================
